name: MARINE PETROLEUM TRUST
summary: Marine Petroleum Trust (MARPS) is a statutory trust for which Argent Trust Company serves as Trustee. The trust is associated with petroleum-related assets. Based on the filing, Jana Egeler serves as Vice President on behalf of Argent Trust Company, which administers the trust. No specific operational business activities, products, or services are described in this excerpt.
